varieties.name: Sugar Baby
varieties.traits: Round icebox type, 6-12 lbs (3-5 kg), dark green to almost black rind, compact vines
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep crimson-red, sweet (high sugar content), crisp texture, small dark seeds
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity, 4-6 melons per vine, early producer
varieties.availability: Widely available at The Seed Collection (Brisbane), Succeed Heirlooms Australia, Diggers Club Australia

varieties.name: Crimson Sweet
varieties.traits: Oblong picnic type, 20-25 lbs (9-11 kg), light green rind with dark green stripes
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, exceptionally sweet (12-13° Brix), firm, fine-textured, few seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, consistent yields, reliable performer

varieties.name: Black Diamond
varieties.traits: Large round to oval, 30-50 lbs (14-23 kg), can reach 75 lbs, dark green mottled rind, large leaves protect from sunburn
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, very sweet, juicy, good texture
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy producer, 2-3 large melons per vine
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection Australia, Eden Brothers (ships to Australia)

varieties.name: Charleston Gray
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 20-40 lbs (9-18 kg), 22-26 inches long, greenish-gray rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, sweet, crisp, virtually fiber-free, exceptional eating quality
varieties.yield_notes: Very good, 1-2 large melons per plant, reliable

varieties.name: Allsweet
varieties.traits: Oblong picnic type, 25-30 lbs (11-14 kg), dark and light green striped rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, exceptionally sweet (sweeter than Crimson Sweet), small seeds, softer texture

varieties.name: Moon and Stars (Red)
varieties.origin: USA heirloom, pre-1926; nearly extinct, rediscovered 1980s
varieties.traits: Round to oval, 20-35 lbs (9-16 kg), dark green rind with distinctive yellow spots (stars) and one large spot (moon), leaves also spotted
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet pink-red, juicy

varieties.name: Georgia Rattlesnake
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 25-50 lbs (11-23 kg), up to 24 inches long, distinctive light green rind with dark green stripes resembling rattlesnake skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright pink to light crimson, sweet, crisp, excellent flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, early producer compared to other large varieties
varieties.availability: Sow True Seed, Thresh Seed Co., Mary's Heirloom Seeds (international shipping)

varieties.name: Jubilee
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 25-45 lbs (11-20 kg), can exceed 2 feet long, light green rind with dark green stripes, tough rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, sweet, crisp, excellent flavor, classic watermelon taste
varieties.availability: Holmes Seed Company, St. Clare Heirloom Seeds, Experimental Farm Network

varieties.name: Kleckley Sweet (Kleckley's Sweet)
varieties.origin: W.A. Kleckley, Georgia, USA; late 1880s; introduced 1894
varieties.traits: Oblong, 25-40 lbs (11-18 kg), dark green rind, thin skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark red, exceptionally sweet, stringless heart, white seeds, famous for superior flavor
varieties.availability: True Leaf Market, Victory Seed Company

varieties.name: Golden Midget
varieties.traits: Small icebox type, 3-5 lbs (1.5-2.3 kg), golden yellow rind when ripe (unique), compact vines
varieties.flesh_fruit: Salmon-pink to red, sweet
varieties.availability: Thresh Seed Co., specialty seed companies

varieties.name: Orangeglo
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 20-30 lbs (9-14 kg), light green rind with dark green stripes
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep orange (unique), very sweet (11.6° Brix), crisp, tropical flavor notes
varieties.availability: Baker Creek Heirloom Seeds, Seed Savers Exchange, Mary's Heirloom Seeds

varieties.name: Yellow Crimson
varieties.traits: Medium size, up to 20 lbs (9 kg), striped green rind (looks traditional outside)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright yellow (surprising), sweet with hints of honey and apricot, large dark seeds

varieties.name: Yellow Petite
varieties.traits: Small icebox type, 5-7 lbs (2-3 kg), round, light green rind with dark stripes, crack-resistant rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet yellow, nearly seedless, honey-like flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Good, leaves protect fruit from sunburn
varieties.availability: Botanical Interests, Survival Garden Seeds

varieties.name: Tom Watson
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 20-40 lbs (9-18 kg), dark green rind, very tough skin (excellent shipper)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep dark red, very sweet, firm

varieties.name: Ali Baba
varieties.traits: Oblong, 12-30 lbs (5-14 kg), thick light green rind (sun-burn resistant)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark red, juicy, wonderfully sweet
varieties.availability: Baker Creek Heirloom Seeds, Sola Seed Company

varieties.name: Mountain Sweet Yellow
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 20-35 lbs (9-16 kg), dark green rind with light green stripes
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep yellow, high sugar content, juicy, firm, sweet, black seeds

varieties.name: Blacktail Mountain
varieties.traits: Small to medium icebox type, 6-15 lbs (3-7 kg), round, dark green to blackish-green rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet scarlet-red
varieties.yield_notes: Good, can be ripened in storage if picked slightly early
varieties.availability: Various heirloom seed suppliers

varieties.name: Kiran 🧬
varieties.origin: Known You Seed Pvt. Ltd., Pune, Maharashtra, India; released 1999
varieties.traits: Small icebox type, 2.5-4 kg (5.5-9 lbs), round to oval, dark green rind with emerald-black undertones, thin but tough rind (excellent for transport)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark saturated red, slightly grainy, crisp, tender, high sugar content 12-14° Brix, sweet and refreshing
varieties.availability: Known You Seed India, widely available throughout Kerala markets and nurseries

varieties.name: Sugar Baby
varieties.traits: Round icebox type, 3-5 kg (6-10 lbs), dark green to black rind, compact
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep red, sweet, crisp, small seeds

varieties.name: Arka Shyama 🌱
varieties.origin: ICAR-Indian Institute of Horticultural Research, India
varieties.traits: Small icebox type, 2.5-3 kg (5.5-6.6 lbs), round, dark green stripes, shorter internodal length (compact plant)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep red, high sugar content 12-14° Brix
varieties.availability: ICAR-IIHR, Indian agricultural seed suppliers

varieties.name: Madhubala 🧬
varieties.traits: Medium size, suitable for Indian markets
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red, sweet

varieties.name: Arjun 🧬
varieties.origin: India, developed for Indian growing conditions
varieties.traits: Medium to large, suitable for commercial cultivation
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red, good quality

varieties.name: Vandana 🧬
varieties.traits: Medium size, suitable for Indian market preferences
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red, sweet, good quality

varieties.name: Improved Shipper 🌱
varieties.traits: Round, small-sized, tough rind for shipping
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crimson, crisp, moderately sweet, dark pink, few embedded seeds
varieties.availability: PAU, Indian agricultural seed companies

varieties.name: NBH-Karan 🧬
varieties.traits: Ice-box type, 5-6 kg (11-13 lbs), vigorous plant, attractive shaped fruits, no cracking
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good red, few seeds, higher edible portions
varieties.availability: Noble Seeds India, available in Kerala

varieties.name: NBH-Asher 🧬
varieties.traits: Ice-box hybrid, 5-7 kg (11-15 lbs), small seeds
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good red, quality flesh
varieties.availability: Noble Seeds India, Kerala agricultural suppliers

varieties.name: NBH-Dolly 🧬
varieties.traits: Sugar Baby type hybrid, medium-sized, 7-8 kg (15-18 lbs)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm red
varieties.availability: Noble Seeds India, Kerala markets

varieties.name: Seminis Apoorva 🧬
varieties.traits: Hybrid, oval to oblong, 9-12 kg (20-26 lbs), light green rind with dark green stripes, disease resistant
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep crimson, good texture, sweet (11-12° Brix), crisp
varieties.availability: Agriplex India, widely available in Kerala

varieties.name: Namdhari Kohinoor 🧬
varieties.traits: Hybrid, oblong, dark green rind with bluish-green stripes, attractive appearance
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep crimson-red, high sugar content 12-13° Brix, sweet, juicy
varieties.availability: Agriplex India, Namdhari Seeds suppliers

varieties.name: US-777 Striped Indian 🧬
varieties.traits: Striped rind, medium to large
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red, sweet, considered best and sweetest variety in India

varieties.name: Yellow Doll
varieties.origin: Hybrid from China, introduced to India
varieties.traits: Small personal/mini type, 2-3 kg (4-7 lbs), round
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright yellow (sunny), sweet, crisp texture, intensely sweet flavor, tropical twist

varieties.name: Red Doll
varieties.origin: Hybrid from China, introduced to India
varieties.traits: Small personal type, compact
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red, sweet

varieties.name: Crimson Sweet
varieties.origin: Kansas State University, USA; 1963; widely adapted to Asian countries
varieties.traits: Oblong, 9-11 kg (20-25 lbs), striped rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, very sweet, firm
varieties.availability: Widely available in India, international seed suppliers

varieties.name: Charleston Gray
varieties.origin: USDA, 1954; popular in African and Asian countries
varieties.traits: Large oblong, 9-18 kg (20-40 lbs), greenish-gray rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright red, sweet, crisp, fiber-free
varieties.availability: Available in India through international seed suppliers

varieties.name: Ali Baba
varieties.traits: Oblong, 5-14 kg (12-30 lbs), thick light green rind (sun-burn resistant)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark red, juicy, wonderfully sweet, exceptional flavor

varieties.name: Kleckley Sweet
varieties.traits: Oblong, 11-18 kg (25-40 lbs), dark green rind
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark red, exceptionally sweet, famous for superior flavor
varieties.availability: International heirloom seed suppliers

varieties.name: Heirloom Varieties: 15 heirloom varieties marked with
